patch.value: Declare pm_min_version in all 8 first-party package manifests

Loader enforces pm_min_version for external packages but all 8 first-party manifests omit it: future breaking SDK changes load stale packages silently, and external authors have no model example. Completes the pm-oxyo version-negotiation story.
Each packages/pm-*/extensions/*/manifest.json declares pm_min_version; scaffold emits a commented placeholder; governance check (see manifest governance test) verifies presence.
